subcodes.first_line: O enamored one of the Divine Beauty! For some time We have written naught unto thee, yet in the realm of the heart, at every moment, We are thy constant companion in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیدای جمال الهی مدتیست بتو چیزی ننگاشتیم ولی در عالم قلب هر دمی بیاد تو همدم
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
